ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game review */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game being reviewed */,
  "period" TEXT /* Quarter of the game during which the incident occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the incident occurred */,
  "seconds_left" INTEGER /* Seconds left in the game at the time of the incident */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call made by the referee */,
  "committing_player" TEXT /* Player who committed the foul or incident */,
  "disadvantaged_player" TEXT /* Player who was disadvantaged by the incident */,
  "review_decision" TEXT /* Decision made upon review of the incident */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Commentary or analysis pertaining to the incident */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video footage of the incident */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who made the call */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location on the court where the incident occurred */,
  "impact_on_game" TEXT /* Description of how the incident impacted the game */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst or coach who reviewed the incident */,
  "review_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES refs ("ref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_committing_player FOREIGN KEY ("committing_player") REFERENCES players ("player_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_disadvantaged_player FOREIGN KEY ("disadvantaged_player") REFERENCES players ("player_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Team playing at home */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Team playing away */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "original_pdf" TEXT /* Path to the original PDF of the game report */,
  "box_score_url" TEXT /* URL to the box score of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., PG, SG) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refs" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "ref_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the referee has been officiating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating based on performance reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review decision */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game review associated with this decision */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of decision made (e.g., Confirm, Change) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or rationale for the decision */,
  "decision_maker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who made the decision */,
  "decision_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_decisions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES game_reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_decisions_decision_maker_id FOREIGN KEY ("decision_maker_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "team_rating" REAL /* Overall team rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach, referee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of access level (e.g., 1 for read-only, 2 for read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
